title: First Solar Breaks Ground on $1.1 Billion, 3.5 GW Louisiana Manufacturing Facility
text: BATON ROUGE, La. and TEMPE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AmericanSolar--First Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FSLR) today broke ground on a previously announced manufacturing facility in Iberia Parish, Louisiana, its fifth fully vertically integrated factory in the United States. The ceremony was attended by the Governor of Louisiana, John Bel Edwards, and other dignitaries from the state. The facility, believed to be the largest capital investment in the area's history, represents an investment of approximately $1.1 billion.
